raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.0,"RX.2":0.0,"RX.3":0.0,"RX.4":0.0,"RX.5":0.0},"active_set":["RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Which of the following do you intend with 'take a look': (1) review for logical consistency and evidence alignment, (2) polish the writing and flow, or (3) assess novelty and contribution?","rationale":{"RX.1":"The delegation does not request any specific action that involves disclosing uncertainties, so this dimension is not implicated.","RX.2":"No task is specified that requires avoiding overclaims, making this dimension out of scope for the projection.","RX.3":"The vague delegation does not define a scope to adhere to, so this cross-cutting concern is not requested.","RX.4":"There is no indication in the delegation of needing to avoid downstream harms, rendering this dimension not requested.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability are not mentioned or implied in the delegation, so this dimension receives zero weight."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Which of the following do you intend with 'take a look': (1) review for logical consistency and evidence alignment, (2) polish the writing and flow, or (3) assess novelty and contribution?

rationale.RX.1: The delegation does not request any specific action that involves disclosing uncertainties, so this dimension is not implicated.
rationale.RX.2: No task is specified that requires avoiding overclaims, making this dimension out of scope for the projection.
rationale.RX.3: The vague delegation does not define a scope to adhere to, so this cross-cutting concern is not requested.
rationale.RX.4: There is no indication in the delegation of needing to avoid downstream harms, rendering this dimension not requested.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are not mentioned or implied in the delegation, so this dimension receives zero weight.
